summary: Member contacted for 'Transitions of Care' gap. Member claims service was completed by Dr. Johnson approximately two months ago. Agent could not verify and flagged for care coordination to follow up with the provider's office. The gap remains open pending verification.
full_context: On 2026-06-10, an agent contacted member MBR00150 for an outbound care gap outreach regarding a 'Transitions of Care' measure (Gap ID: GAP000413). The member stated they believe the service was already completed about two months prior by 'Dr. Johnson downtown'. As the completion was not in the system, the agent informed the member they would flag the case for a care coordination team to follow up directly with the provider's office for confirmation. The agent advised that if confirmation is not received within 30 days, another follow-up call might be made. The CSR notes confirm the member's claim and that care coordination was notified, with the gap status remaining 'Open - pending verification'.
member_request: Member asked if they needed to take any action.

Agent initiated follow-up by care coordination team with provider.
Gap status remains open pending verification.

key_findings: Member MBR00150 was contacted for a 'Transitions of Care' gap.
